TYPES.FPCLINE: * tt_J_1IEXCHDR TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_J_1IEXCHDR.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBRP INTO LS_VBRP
FROM VBRP INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF @LW_VBRP
*CONCATENATE plant_add-NAME1 plant_add-name2 plant_add-street plant_add-post_code1 plant_add-city1 plant_add-time_zone into lv_data separated by ''.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005T INTO GS_T005T
DATA: LT_NAST TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF NAST,
SELECT * FROM NAST INTO TABLE LT_NAST WHERE
CONCATENATE G_NAME_P G_NAME_P2 G_STREET_P G_POST_CODE_P G_CITY_P INTO LV_DATA SEPARATED BY ''.
* SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO G_LANDX_P
*SELECT SINGLE J_1IEXCD FROM J_1IMOCOMP INTO GV_J_1IEXCD
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_VBRP
READ TABLE IT_VBRP INTO WA_VBRP WITH KEY
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_J_1IMOCOMP
READ TABLE IT_J_1IMOCOMP INTO WA_J_1IMOCOMP INDEX 1.
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_J_1IEXCHDR
READ TABLE IT_J_1IEXCHDR INTO WA_J_1IEXCHDR INDEX 1.
LV_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
**** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
*** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
*** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
*** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
*** CONCATENATE lr_no wa_lines-tdline INTO lr_no SEPARATED BY space.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LR_NO WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LR_NO SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE XBLNR INTO ODN FROM VBRK WHERE
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '-'IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ''.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* Replace all OCCURRENCES OF 'Rupees' IN AMT_WRD WITH ' '.
CONCATENATE '-' LV_AMT_IN_WORDS INTO LV_AMT_IN_WORDS SEPARATED BY SPACE.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'Rupees' IN AMT_WRD WITH ' '.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'N' IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ' '.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'Paise' IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ' '.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'Rupees' IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ' and Paise'.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '-'IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ''.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'N' IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ' '.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '-'IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ''.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '-'IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ''.
CONCATENATE '-' LV_AMT_IN_WORDS INTO LV_AMT_IN_WORDS SEPARATED BY SPACE.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
*Replace all OCCURRENCES OF 'N' IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ' '.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'Paise' IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ' '.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'Rupees' IN LV_AMT_IN_WORDS WITH ' and Paise'.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TRA WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LV_TRA SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_FRE WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LV_FRE SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_CON WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LV_CON SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_DEL WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LV_DEL SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_ORI WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LV_ORI SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_WAR WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LV_WAR SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_OCC WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO LV_OCC SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE LV_OCC wa_lines1-tdline INTO LV_OCC SEPARATED BY space.

FORMS.FPCLINE: * Valid numbers for IF_TABLE: 1 text from sales organisation
* default: read text from sales org
